'''Devers''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial Army trooper/Legends|Imperial Army trooper]] stationed at [[Eiattu 6]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was under the command of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Leonia Tavira]] and often feared that if he failed, he would be punished harshly. Shortly before the liberation on Eiattu, he and another [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] were patrolling the deep swamps near the capital [[City/Legends|city]], searching for the body of the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Nrin Vakil]]. Nrin was hiding in the murky water, waiting to ambush the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. When Devers leaned over the edge of his patrol boat, he was pulled down by Nrin and drowned.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 16|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 16]] {{1st}}
